violations.text: Calzones were observed held between 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit in the 2-door lowboy. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Calzones were moved to walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in 2-door lowboy until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bqy sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
